MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S Motion To Approve Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment is Off Calendar. Duplicate entry.

Notice Of Motion And Otion To Approve Settlement And For Entry O Fconsent Judment
Off Calendar Mar-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David Williams, Esq., of the Law Offices of David Williams, Tel. 510.270.0826, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S Motion To Approve Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment is Granted. No opposition filed and compliance with the statutory requirements has been shown. Order and Judgment signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
